overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking from the desert outskirts into a bustling urban street, crossing at an intersection, and continuing along the sidewalk past a gas station toward the Night City skyline with holographic advertisements and a smoking stadium in the distance.

events.description: transition from desert dirt path onto paved concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from desert scrubland toward the city street infrastructure

entered.detail: dry bushes and desert plants lining the dirt path
unpaved desert ground transitioning to urban pavement
utility poles with multiple power lines stretching across the scene
large rocky hill formation in the background
small buildings and structures at the edge of the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide desert area with sparse vegetation and a dirt path leading toward the city. The camera walks forward, transitioning from the natural desert terrain onto a concrete sidewalk as urban infrastructure becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk then crossing the multi-lane street with other pedestrians
turning slightly right to align with the crosswalk and crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then crossing the busy street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection
black SUV driving past on the road before the crossing

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with red curb markings
multi-lane city street with vehicle traffic
large purple and white sign for PieZ pizza restaurant
two-story green residential building with solar panels on roof
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights and speakers

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city sidewalk with the PieZ pizza sign visible ahead, the camera approaches an intersection, waits for traffic, then crosses the multi-lane road with other pedestrians. A black SUV passes by on the right as the crossing begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with stadium view and barriers

events.description: reaching the opposite side of the street and continuing along the sidewalk with stadium in view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past concrete barriers and palm trees with the stadium ahead

notable_agents.action: man in purple tank top and white pants walking in the opposite direction
green delivery van driving along the road

entered.detail: large circular stadium structure with black smoke rising from the top
tall cylindrical building with yellow and black geometric pattern facade
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
heavy concrete blocks with metal railings separating sidewalk from road
large sign for CHOOM gas station with distinctive lettering

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera continues along a sidewalk bordered by concrete barriers and palm trees. The large stadium with smoke billowing from it dominates the center view, while a distinctive yellow geometric tower rises on the right. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as vehicles pass on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with burning stadium view and highway access

events.description: turning left at the intersection to follow the road curve toward the stadium
navigating through intersection with multiple vehicles including vans and cars passing by

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge with a clear view of the smoking stadium and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: orange van driving past followed by other varied vehicles on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with multiple lanes crossing over
large empty billboard frames and advertising structures
sandy desert terrain between the road and the stadium structure
floating holographic advertisements visible in the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at an intersection, opening up a wide view of the smoking stadium across a desert lot. Various vehicles including an orange van drive past on the multi-lane road. Highway overpasses and billboards line the left side while holographic ads float above the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with city skyline view

events.description: entering the CHOOM gas station area with fuel pumps and price signs visible

agents.ego_description: walking past the gas station pumps and canopy while observing the Night City skyline ahead

entered.detail: large metal canopy structure covering the fuel pumps
digital sign displaying fuel prices for ULTRA, PREMIUM, and PLUS grades
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
tall buildings with large holographic projections and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment passes through a gas station forecourt with a large price board showing fuel grades. The camera moves under the station canopy while the impressive Night City skyline with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements fills the view ahead. The environment transitions from open desert to dense urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sparse desert outskirts into the dense, neon-lit urban core of Night City. It begins on a dirt path amidst sparse vegetation, moving forward as the natural terrain transitions into a concrete sidewalk and urban infrastructure. As the camera approaches a city intersection, it waits for traffic before crossing a multi-lane road alongside other pedestrians and a passing black SUV. The scene then expands past concrete barriers and palm trees toward a smoking stadium and a yellow geometric tower, eventually turning left to reveal highway overpasses and holographic advertisements floating above the distant skyline. Finally, the camera passes through a gas station forecourt and under its canopy, where the open desert completely gives way to a vista of towering skyscrapers and glowing city lights.
